meta.race_name: Sun Racing Plate Handicap Chase (Premier Handicap)

rankings.name: Madara (FR)
key_positive_factors: High cruising speed suits Plate pace
Harry Skelton/Dan Skelton connection is formidable
Proven at Leopardstown in high-end company
key_risks: Uphill finish at Cheltenham tests stamina limits at 2m4f
Carrying 140 is a fair test

rankings.name: Peaky Boy (IRE)
key_positive_factors: Jonjo O'Neill is a master of prepping for this specific race
Carrying a very dangerous racing weight of 139
key_risks: Lacks experience in a 20+ runner handicap field

rankings.name: Zurich (FR)
key_positive_factors: Typical Willie Mullins unexposed French import
Strong traveling style suits the New Course
key_risks: May lack the battle-hardened experience required for a Premier Handicap

rankings.name: Down Memory Lane (IRE)
key_positive_factors: Highest class horse in the field (potential graded winner)
Jack Kennedy booked for Gordon Elliott
key_risks: Assigned OR 152 leaves zero margin for error
Weight burden in a fast-paced handicap

rankings.name: McLaurey (IRE)
key_risks: More exposed than the novices at the top of the market

rankings.name: No Questions Asked (IRE)
key_positive_factors: Ben Pauling yard is having an excellent season
key_risks: Needs to find 5-7lbs of improvement to win a race of this depth

rankings.name: Will The Wise (IRE)
key_risks: Keith Donoghue booking suggests he might be the second string today

rankings.name: Downmexicoway (IRE)
key_risks: Jumping can be erratic under extreme pressure

rankings.name: O'Moore Park (IRE)
key_positive_factors: Mullins runner with Sean O'Keeffe claiming
key_risks: Poor strike rate at this level

rankings.name: Guard Your Dreams
key_positive_factors: Nigel Twiston-Davies runners peak at the Festival
key_risks: Better known as a hurdler; may lack chase efficiency late in the race

rankings.name: Dee Capo (FR)
key_risks: Top weight is notoriously difficult in the Plate

rankings.name: Jipcot (FR)
key_risks: Can be a difficult ride; consistency is an issue

rankings.name: Boombawn (IRE)
key_positive_factors: Third-string Skelton horse; often plotted for this
key_risks: Lacks the gear change of the principals

rankings.name: Booster Bob (IRE)
key_risks: Lacks the pace for a typical Plate finish

rankings.name: Midnight It Is
key_positive_factors: Gavin Cromwell has a superb record in UK handicaps
key_risks: Current form is underwhelming

rankings.name: Jungle Boogie (IRE)
key_positive_factors: Glimpses of high class in the past
key_risks: Fragile career; difficult to trust fitness

rankings.name: Riskintheground (IRE)
key_risks: Looks held by stablemates on collateral form

rankings.name: Theatre Native (IRE)
key_risks: Significant step up in quality required

rankings.name: Western Zephyr (IRE)
key_positive_factors: Early pace could see him lead early
key_risks: Unlikely to sustain the effort up the hill

rankings.name: Grandeur D'ame (FR)
key_risks: Exposed; mark is probably accurate

rankings.name: Embittered (IRE)
key_risks: Seems to be regressing

rankings.name: Moon D'orange (FR)
key_risks: No recent form of note

rankings.name: Yes Indeed (FR)
key_risks: Lacks the class for this Premier Handicap
